mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} LIMIT 1
SELECT i.* FROM inventory i JOIN goods g ON i.goods_id = g.id WHERE i.quantity < g.min_stock AND g.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory i JOIN goods g ON i.goods_id = g.id WHERE i.quantity < g.min_stock AND g.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (goods_id, warehouse_id, quantity, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET goods_id = #{goodsId}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
